leadText: Oinkologne (Japanese: パフュートン Perfuton) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. It evolves from Lechonk starting at level 18.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Oinkologne is a quadrupedal Pokémon resembling a hog, with differing physiques between the male and the female. Generally speaking, Oinkologne has a large, stout build with a smooth, glossy coat. It has yellow growths underneath its eyes that resemble eyelashes, droopy triangular ears with yellow insides, a triangular snout, and a long, thin tail that curls counter-clockwise. It has well-developed leg muscles, which allow it to leap to a height of over 16 feet (5 meters). Both genders of Oinkologne have pink colorations on their eyelids, snouts, cloven hooves, and the tips of their tails, although the pink colorations on the male is more saturated than that of the female. The male also has a larger left ear and a shorter right ear, and vice versa for the female. The body of a male Oinkologne is entirely grayish black, with darker colorations on its face and ears. Its tail ends in a bulb or flower bud-like shape, which is able to unleash a concentrated sweet scent to cover its body, in order to attract female Pokémon. The male Oinkologne is the only known Pokémon that can have Lingering Aroma as an Ability . In contrast, female Oinkologne has a dark brownish coat with a lighter brown color on its face and ears, and its tail ends in three long appendages. Its body is surrounded by a floral aroma that calms nearby Pokémon. The female Oinkologne enjoys keeping things tidy, taking a meticulous approach to it. Male Oinkologne's sweet scent Female Oinkologne's floral aroma Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Oinkologne evolves from Lechonk . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Lechonk Normal Male → First Evolution Oinkologne Male Normal Female → First Evolution Oinkologne Female Normal

Generation IX Paldea #11 Kitakami #— Blueberry #— Lumiose #— Hyperspace #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Legends: Z-A . Male Scarlet Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail. Violet It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body. Female Scarlet This Pokémon sends a flowerlike scent wafting about. Well-developed muscles in its legs allow it to leap more than 16 feet with no trouble at all. Violet This is a meticulous Pokémon that likes to keep things tidy. It shrouds itself in a floral aroma that soothes the Pokémon around it. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . Oinkologne in the Paldea Pokédex Game locations [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation IX. If this Pokémon has Thick Fat , the effectiveness of Fire-type moves is ½× and the effectiveness of Ice-type moves is ½×. sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry HZ036 Oinkologne Roy's Rotom Phone Oinkologne, female form. The Hog Pokémon. A Normal type. They tend to be tidy and meticulous, and they give off a floral aroma that soothes other Pokémon. HZ036 Oinkologne Roy's Rotom Phone Oinkologne, male form. The Hog Pokémon. A Normal type. It exudes a sweet, alluring scent from its tail, make it irresistable to female Pokémon.
